content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit is imported and HMHomeManager instantiated in App/WallpaperGridView.swift:2-4, but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI or accessory control, and no HomeKit mention in description.txt.
Pierre: Apple explicitly requires HomeKit to be used for its intended home-automation purpose (guideline 2.5.1/4.5), and an unrelated wallpaper app instantiating HMHomeManager with zero home-related UI looks like framework misuse that reviewers flag or reject. Verify whether HomeKit is actually needed here; if not, remove the import/entitlement and the HMHomeManager instance entirely.
